content: GTK4/libadwaita apps query org.gnome.desktop.interface (color-scheme, accent-color) live via GSettings/dconf through xdg-desktop-portal (xdg-desktop-portal-gtk) unless ADW_DISABLE_PORTAL=1. This live-updates dark/light + accent color, but custom named-color overrides in gtk-4.0/gtk.css are only read at app startup.
